name: code-snippet
description: Displays code (inline, single-line, or multi-line) with an optional copy button, lightweight built-in syntax highlighting for bash/css/js/ts, and an optional terminal-window look

meta.name: CodeSnippet
meta.description: Displays code (inline, single-line, or multi-line) with an optional copy button, lightweight built-in syntax highlighting for bash/css/js/ts, and an optional terminal-window look

props.name: variant
props.description: inline = a <code> span; single = one-line <pre>; multi = multi-line <pre>.

props.name: language
props.description: Enables built-in syntax highlighting for the block variants; inline is never highlighted.

props.name: terminal
props.description: Renders terminal-window chrome (title bar with dots). Block variants only.

props.name: title
props.description: Optional label shown in the terminal title bar.

props.name: showLineNumbers
props.description: Show line numbers (multi only; ignored when language is set).

props.name: showCopyButton
props.description: Show the copy-to-clipboard button. Defaults true for single/multi, false for inline.

props.name: labels
props.description: Overrides for the component’s user-visible strings (i18n).

props.name: className
props.description: Additional CSS class names merged onto the root element.

examples.title: Terminal block
examples.code:
<CodeSnippet
  variant="multi"
  language="bash"
  terminal
  title="deploy.sh"
  code={'pnpm build\npnpm deploy'}
/>
examples.description: Multi-line shell transcript with terminal-window chrome.

whenToUse: Showing a command, token, or path the user is expected to copy
Displaying a short read-only code block in docs or UI
Inline code references inside flowing text (inline variant)
whenNotToUse: An editable code input — use a textarea or code editor
Whole source files needing folding, diagnostics, or many languages — use a dedicated viewer; the built-in highlighter is a presentational scan for bash/css/js/ts only

antiPatterns.why: The inline variant is a single in-text chip; multi-line content belongs in the multi variant

related.name: CopyButton
related.reason: CodeSnippet embeds the same clipboard behavior for its copy affordance

intent.a11yRationale: Code is rendered in semantic <code>/<pre>. The copy button is a real button with an aria-label that flips between the copy and copied messages so the action and its result are announced. Line numbers are aria-hidden so they are not read as content.

flexibility.note: inline | single | multi — controls the wrapping element and layout
Shown by default for single/multi; togglable via showCopyButton
